[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111110 6
1 0001110 3
2 1111010 5
3 0101111 5
4 1011100 4
5 1101110 5
6 0011100 3
7 1111010 5

01 10 1111111 a
12 21 1111110 6 match 0
23 32 1111110 6 match 0
34 43 1111111 a
45 54 1101111 6
56 65 1111111 a
67 76 0010010 2
70 07 0110011 4

02 20 0111111 6
13 31 1111110 6 match 0
24 42 0101111 5 match 3
35 53 1111111 a
46 64 0111111 6
57 75 1111111 a
60 06 0110011 4
71 17 1111110 6 match 0

03 30 1111011 6
14 41 1111111 a
25 52 1101111 6
36 63 1111010 5 match 2 7
47 74 0111111 6
50 05 1111111 a
61 16 1111110 6 match 0
72 27 0011110 4

04 40 0111111 6
15 51 1111111 a
26 62 0011110 4
37 73 1111010 5 match 2 7
